crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, and work on your highest priority task.

crons.name: ecosystem-scan
crons.prompt: Run daily ecosystem scan. Check: (1) Anthropic news/blog for new Claude models, prompt techniques, Claude Code features, (2) popular agentic repos (GitHub trending for Claude/agent keywords, HN front page AI items, r/ClaudeAI top posts), (3) cortextOS community catalog for new skills. Log findings as dashboard event `action ecosystem_scan info` with meta summary. If you find something directly upgrade-worthy, message the relevant specialist with a suggestion + link.

crons.name: domain-scan
crons.prompt: Weekly per-specialist domain scan. For each specialist (seo, content, dev, prospector, ads): surface 1-2 concrete, credible tactic/tool/framework updates from their domain (SEO: Search Engine Journal, Moz, Ahrefs blog; content: copywriting blogs, creator growth cases; dev: WP dev best practices, CTA/CRO research; prospector: cold outreach playbooks; ads: Google/Meta/TikTok ad platform changes). Send each specialist one upgrade suggestion message. Log `action domain_scan info` with meta {specialist, suggestion_count}.

crons.name: experiment-ecosystem_scan_adoption
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/autoresearch/SKILL.md and execute the experiment loop for ecosystem_scan_adoption cycle. Measure digest adoption per the cycle spec.

crons.name: weekly-agent-audit
crons.prompt: Run weekly agent audit. For each specialist, read their goals.json + skills/* + last 7 days of their activity log. Produce an audit report: (a) what they did well, (b) drift from their goals, (c) concrete skill gaps to close, (d) recommended goal/config changes. Send report to boss as an agent message, not the user directly — boss decides what to route up.

crons.name: phantom-endpoint-scan
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/phantom-endpoint-scan/SKILL.md and execute the weekly phantom-endpoint sweep. Surface any new phantoms to analyst with full producer/consumer evidence. Log events per the skill spec.

crons.name: daily-upgrade-proposal
crons.prompt: Generate and post 1 new system upgrade proposal to #overnight-proposals (Slack channel C0ATHEL5VJL). Scope: cortextos code/features, agent skills, daemon behavior, fleet coordination, observability, dashboard, KPI tracking, onboarding flow, developer experience. Format: target surface, hypothesis (what the upgrade does + why it matters), expected impact, user-review hook (approve/modify/reject). Raw ideas are fine — no pre-vetting needed. Log dashboard event action upgrade_proposal info with meta summary.
